description: Lower part of a marriage contract (ketubba). Written and signed by Avraham b. Shabbetay. Groom: Yefet b. Nissim. Bride: Sitt al-Dār bt. Yiṣḥaq. Location: Fustat. Dated: Sunday, 21 Adar 1374 Seleucid, which is 1063 CE. On verso of Halper 339, there is Hebrew poetry (written after the document was torn up). (Information in part from Mediterranean Society, II, pp. 47, 532.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
